caption: Two men are seated side-by-side in an indoor setting in front of a television screen and a wooden shelf filled with DVDs. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. The text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" appears in yellow letters across the top of the frames. On-screen overlays include "@RICKSEGALL" on the left, "@KORBINMILES" on the right, and a small red "PATREON" logo. As the sequence progresses, the men react with amusement. Initially, they share slight smiles, but they transition into laughter. The man on the left opens his mouth wide in a laugh and gestures with his hand, while the man on the right looks down, smiling broadly and covering his mouth with his hand. A small potted plant is visible on the left side of the background.
